channel.title: GhostESP Blog
channel.description: News, updates, and deep dives from the GhostESP project — the open-source wireless research platform for ESP32.

item.title: The Module Is Not the Problem
item.description: RF modules are neutral hardware. The real conversation is about firmware design, documentation, intent, and impact.

item.title: Common Misconceptions About ESP32 "Hacking" Tools
item.description: A maintainer's honest look at what people keep getting wrong about the ESP32 security-tool ecosystem.

item.title: Wi-Fi Deauthentication vs RF Jamming: What's the Difference?
item.description: A breakdown of how Wi-Fi deauth and RF jamming actually differ — how each works, where they sit in the stack, and why the distinction matters.
